responsibilities: Monitor portfolio-level market and credit risk exposures against established limits and escalate breaches to senior management
Develop and maintain Value at Risk and stress testing models to quantify potential losses under adverse market scenarios
Prepare regulatory risk reports in compliance with Basel III, Dodd-Frank, and other applicable financial regulations
Analyze counterparty credit exposure and recommend hedging or limit adjustments to mitigate concentration risk
Collaborate with trading desks and risk committees to evaluate the risk implications of new products and trading strategies
Conduct scenario and sensitivity analysis to assess portfolio vulnerability to interest rate, FX, and credit spread shocks
Build automated dashboards and reporting tools to track key risk indicators and limit utilization in real time
Validate risk models and data inputs to ensure accuracy and consistency across front-office and risk management systems
